_purpose: Standing preferences for Codex while working in this repo. Minimal confirmation mode — Codex should proceed with tasks without asking for confirmation unless explicitly listed in always_ask_before.

allowed_when: The change is directly related to the current requested task.
The file is within the active RoundHero worktree/folder Codex is using.
The edit does not overwrite unrelated user/Claude work.
The edit does not remove data, delete files, reset branches, or discard changes.

assume_yes_for: Reading any file in the repo.
Writing or editing any file matching permission_free_edits globs.
Running git status, git diff, git log, git branch.
Running git add on campaign-related files.
Running grep, find, ls, cat on any file.
Running python, py, python3 for validation or testing scripts.
Running npm install, npm run build, npm start.
Creating new files within the campaigns feature scope.
always_ask_before: Reverting, resetting, checking out, or discarding existing changes.
Committing or pushing unless explicitly asked in the current task.
Installing new packages not already in requirements.txt or package.json.

Editing any of these shared integration files without explicit instruction: frontend/src/App.js, backend/app.py, backend/models/__init__.py, frontend/src/components/Navbar.js, frontend/src/components/Header.js, frontend/src/index.js, frontend/src/App.css.

project_ui_notes.encounter_row_fields: Do not redesign encounter setup/runner input boxes away from Claude's separated field layout. Keep INIT, AC, HP, TEMP, conditions, and concentration as distinct labeled controls with fixed/min widths and no overlapping combined boxes. If a row layout needs work, preserve that field method and adjust spacing/grid only.
project_ui_notes.encounter_text_inputs: Avoid saving encounter JSON on every keystroke for free-text fields. Use local draft inputs that commit on blur/Enter or a safe debounce, matching the prior character-sheet typing fix.
